summary: Mapbox static-map thumbnail URL template duplicated verbatim between #thumbnailUrl and Twirl helper @routeThumbUrl in dashboard.scala.html (66-70).
failure_scenario: Two hand-maintained copies (JS + Scala); tweaking style leaves dashboard vs RouteBuilder cards mismatched. Backend already computes encoded_polyline (RouteService.getRoutesForUser); per CLAUDE.md backend-source-of-truth, emit thumbnail_url from backend (RouteWithStats + /userapi/routes JSON). Path color 3E8BD9 is also a re-declared design token (--color-link-100, main.css:114).

summary: Map-paint colors hardcode design-token hexes ('#B3B3B3' = --color-neutral-500 at 513; '#2D2A3F' = --color-asphalt-500 at 392/407/576) with a comment claiming map paint can't read CSS tokens, but ps-map already established the pattern.
failure_scenario: public/js/ps-map/addStreetsToMap.js:16-19 resolves the same tokens for Mapbox paint via getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--color-asphalt-500').trim(). With four hardcoded copies here, a token retune updates ps-map layers but leaves RouteBuilder's colors stale. Use the getComputedStyle pattern.

summary: #formatDistance re-implements km-to-miles conversion inline (km / 1.609344) instead of calling util.math.kmsToMiles, which is loaded on this page.
failure_scenario: util.math.kmsToMiles (public/js/common/utilitiesMath.js:99) is globally available (main.scala.html:69 loads utilitiesMath.js on every page) — and drift is already real: this copy uses 1.609344 while util.math uses 1.60934, so RouteBuilder mile figures use a different constant than every other distance display. Replace with util.math.kmsToMiles(km).

summary: RouteGraph.distanceM/lineLengthM hand-roll haversine that duplicates util.math.haversine (utilitiesMath.js:36) and turf.length/turf.distance, both loaded on the page.
failure_scenario: Three inconsistent great-circle implementations with different Earth radii (util.math 6372800 m, RouteGraph 6371008.8 m, turf's own) and the same page mixes them: #updateStats sums with turf.length (RouteBuilder.js:921/1084) while #animateExplorer paces with RouteGraph.distanceM — 'distance' means different things within one screen. At minimum distanceM should delegate to util.math.haversine so one radius constant governs frontend distance math.

summary: getCityLabelingSpeed copy-pastes the per-schema speed block from getCrossCityLabelingSpeed (830-839), differing only in unit factor (60.0 vs 3600.0).
failure_scenario: Two near-identical computations in different units (minutes vs seconds), each with its own 24h cache — a fix to the guard/formula/error handling in one silently misses the other; the units mismatch is exactly the kind of drift that produces a 60x bug. Extract one private helper used by both.

summary: #route-stats-headline hand-assembles type as 'font: 700 24px/30px var(--font-primary)' instead of the composite token --text-h3-bold (main.css:145) with a line-height override.
failure_scenario: CLAUDE.md design-system rule: keep the --text-* token and override just the divergent property ('font: var(--text-h3-bold); line-height: 30px;'). The hand-rolled copy detaches the stats headline from the token set, so a retune of h3 in main.css updates everything except this readout.

summary: #buildSearchBox re-implements the MapboxSearchBox mount boilerplate that initLabelMapLocationSearch already established in public/js/labelMapLocationSearch.js (151-168), whose header comment now dangles.
failure_scenario: Two hand-kept copies of the search-box setup: a Search-JS upgrade quirk fixed in one page and not the other. Extract a shared mount helper in public/js/common/, and update labelMapLocationSearch.js:9 which still says it 'Mirrors the setup in routeBuilder.js (#setUpSearchBox)' — a file/method this PR deletes.
